zh.Chelmarsh, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾傑爾馬緒
zh.Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, E: 英國賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Mortimer III於大約1232年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫時，他的父親Ralph Mortimer11230歲，母親Gwladys ferch Llywelyn28歲。他與Agatha de Ferrers結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1273年6月之前在英國史洛普爾傑爾馬緒，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

zh-hans.Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, E: 英国賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Mortimer III于大约1232年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾維格莫时，他的父亲Ralph Mortimer11230岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Llywelyn28岁。他与Agatha de Ferrers结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1273年6月之前在英国史洛普爾傑爾馬緒，埋葬在英国賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Mortimer III was born about 1232, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Mortimer, was 11230 and his mother, Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, was 28. He married Agatha de Ferrers. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before June 1273, in Chelmarsh, Shropshire, England, and was buried in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Mortimer III est né environ 1232, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Mortimer, avait 11230 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Agatha de Ferrers. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant juin 1273, à Chelmarsh, Shropshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Mortimer III um 1232 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Mortimer 11230 und seine Mutter Gwladys ferch Llywelyn 28. Er hat Agatha de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor Juni 1273 in Chelmarsh, Shropshire, England und wurde in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Mortimer III è nato il circa 1232 nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Mortimer, aveva 11230 anni e il suo madre, Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Agatha de Ferrers. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del giugno 1273, nel Chelmarsh, Shropshire, England, e fu sepolto a Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Mortimer IIIが約1232年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Ralph Mortimerは11230歳，母Gwladys ferch Llywelynは28歳であった。Agatha de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1273年6月以前にイギリスシュロプシュアイアチェルマーッシュで死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーウィグモー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Mortimer III(이)가 대략 1232년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Mortimer(은)는 11230세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Llywelyn(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Agatha de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 6월 이전 영국 슈럽실르 헬마시에서 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 위그모어 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Mortimer III nasceu aproximadamente 1232, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Mortimer, tinha 11230 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Agatha de Ferrers. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes junho de 1273, em Chelmarsh, Shropshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Mortimer III родился около 1232 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Mortimer было 11230 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha de Ferrers. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед июнь 1273 г. в местности челмарш, шропшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности вигмор эбби, вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Mortimer III nació aproximadamente 1232, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Mortimer, tenía 11230 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Agatha de Ferrers. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de junio de 1273, en Chelmarsh, Shropshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
